# show

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/show`

Package show is GOLC's durable ShowState substrate (CONTEXT
POOL-01/POOL-02/D-16): the working document every Pool, Deployment,
Group, and programming.ProgrammerState scratch buffer lives inside,
revisioned so a stale impact plan can be detected against a moved
Revision. store.go backs Load/Save/LoadForRead with a single-writer
SQLite .golc file (D-01..D-03) instead of a JSON file, never trusting
anything read from disk before strictjson.DecodeStrict and validate()
both pass (threat T-02-10), and Save commits a recovery-point write and
the state save as two immediately-sequential transactions (D-04) so
storage can never enter the playback timing path. recovery.go (SHOW-04,
D-07) is the read-only other half: it detects, offers, discards, and
accepts a recovery point, but never auto-applies one on its own.
